bags.name: Rebel — Hell Raiser
bags.description: Full-bead bucket bag. Flame gradient heart motif in purple, orange and gold. Purple satin lining with ribbon tassels. Hand-beaded to order.
bags.whatsapp_text: Hi Marjory! I'd like to order the Rebel — Hell Raiser bag (KSH 6,000). Could you confirm availability and delivery details?

bags.name: Rebel — Powerpuff
bags.description: Full-bead bucket bag. Rainbow heart motif in violet, orange and yellow. Purple satin lining with ribbon tassels. Hand-beaded to order.
bags.whatsapp_text: Hi Marjory! I'd like to order the Rebel — Powerpuff bag (KSH 6,000). Could you confirm availability and delivery details?

bags.name: Rose Pearl
bags.description: Structured pearl-bead tote. Ivory white with black flower motif and black beaded handles. The everyday bag that never blends in.
bags.whatsapp_text: Hi Marjory! I'd like to order the Rose Pearl bag (KSH 4,800). Could you confirm availability and delivery details?

bags.name: Bespoke Bag
bags.description: Your vision, our craft. Choose your colours, pattern and size. Every custom piece is a one-of-one made exclusively for you.
bags.whatsapp_text: Hi Marjory! I'd like to commission a custom bag. Can we discuss what I have in mind?

wearables.name: Bespoke Wearable
wearables.description: Festival wear, body chains, statement pieces — all made to your brief. Tell us the occasion, the feeling, the colours. We'll handle the rest.
wearables.whatsapp_text: Hi Marjory! I'd like to commission a custom wearable piece. Can we talk through what I have in mind?
